blended.narrative: Mount Snow is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 7 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 2,913 ft. Looking ahead, 14 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 2.7" of snow, highs of 24°F. Expect powder.
Saturday: 4" of snow, highs of 25°F. Expect powder.
